mono.purpose: Code, shell output, versions, and paths.

shadows.name: shell-frame
shadows.purpose: Defines the Electron window as one contained work surface.

shadows.name: composer-lift
shadows.purpose: Separates the message composer from the timeline.

shadows.name: menu-lift
shadows.purpose: Temporary menus and panels above the active task.

shadows.name: inset-selection
shadows.purpose: Selected navigation without a saturated highlight.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selection, and compact menu state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); color: rgb(var(--color-bg, 15 15 14)); min-height: 28px; padding: 7px 12px; font: 500 12px/1.5 var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Compact secondary command used throughout toolbars and menus.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: transparent; color: rgb(var(--color-muted, 148 146 137)); min-height: 28px; padding: 7px 8px; font: 500 12px/1.5 var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square tool control with a required accessible name and tooltip.
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; padding: 0; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: transparent; color: rgb(var(--color-subtle, 105 103 96)); transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-icon-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); } .ds-icon-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact framed field for settings, paths, and filtering.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 148px; border: 1px solid rgb(var(--color-border, 49 49 45)); border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: rgb(var(--color-surface, 31 31 29)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); padding: 8px 12px; font: 600 13px/1.5 var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline: none; } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63) / 0.22); }

components.name: Active Navigation Item
components.description: Selected item in settings, runtime, or thread navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; width: 240px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 0.75rem); background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); padding: 8px 10px; text-align: left; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63) / 0.28) inset; } .ds-nav-active svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; flex: none; fill: none; stroke: rgb(var(--color-subtle, 105 103 96)); stroke-width: 1.8; } .ds-nav-active span { min-width: 0; } .ds-nav-active strong, .ds-nav-active small { display: block; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-family: var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-nav-active strong { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-active small { margin-top: 2px; color: rgb(var(--color-subtle, 105 103 96)); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Skill Chip
components.description: Attached skill or compact contextual capability marker.
components.css: .ds-skill-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; max-width: 100%; border: 1px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(var(--color-surface, 31 31 29)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); padding: 4px 8px; font: 500 12px/1.5 var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-skill-chip button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 16px; height: 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: rgb(var(--color-muted, 148 146 137)); } .ds-skill-chip button:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); } .ds-skill-chip button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Chat Composer
components.description: Primary working surface for message input and active runtime context.
components.css: .ds-composer { width: min(100%, 48rem); border: 1px solid rgb(var(--color-border, 49 49 45)); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 0.75rem); background: rgb(var(--color-surface-raised, 39 39 36) / 0.9); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.18); font-family: var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-composer textarea { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; resize: none; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; font: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-composer textarea::placeholder { color: rgb(var(--color-subtle, 105 103 96)); } .ds-composer-tools { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-top: 12px; } .ds-composer-tools button { border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: transparent; color: rgb(var(--color-muted, 148 146 137)); padding: 4px 8px; font: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-composer-tools button:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); } .ds-composer-tools .ds-send { width: 36px; height: 36px; margin-left: auto; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); color: rgb(var(--color-bg, 15 15 14)); } .ds-composer-tools button:focus-visible, .ds-composer textarea:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Concise status feedback above the active task.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; width: min(calc(100vw - 32px), 34rem); border: 1px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 0.75rem); background: rgb(var(--color-surface-raised, 39 39 36)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); padding: 12px 14px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); font: 400 13px/1.35 var(--font-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-toast-icon { color: rgb(var(--color-muted, 148 146 137)); } .ds-toast button { margin-left: auto; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 0.5rem); background: transparent; color: rgb(var(--color-subtle, 105 103 96)); } .ds-toast button:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-surface-hover, 48 48 44)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg, 231 230 224)); } .ds-toast button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgb(var(--color-border-strong, 70 69 63)); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Carrent is a focused desktop surface for an engineer working through sustained local agent sessions. In a dim workspace the Night theme reduces glare with warm graphite layers; in daylight the Paper theme preserves the same hierarchy with warm whites and soft ink. Both themes feel like the same tool, not separate brands.

The system is dense, restrained, and operational. Information stays close to the action, familiar icons carry repeated commands, and state is conveyed with tone, border strength, and concise text. It explicitly rejects marketing-style composition inside the app, playful chatbot aesthetics, decorative gradients, excessive cards, oversized labels, and runtime terminology that hides the user's actual selection.

This document covers `apps/desktop` only. The landing site is not designed yet and must not inherit a speculative theme from this file.
keyCharacteristics: Warm graphite and paper-white theme parity.
Compact three-pane desktop structure with predictable navigation.
Tonal layering and 1px hairlines before shadows.
System sans typography with mono reserved for code and paths.
Controls that remain usable from 8px through 32px text scaling.

rules.name: The Desktop-Only Rule
rules.body: Apply these tokens to `apps/desktop`; do not theme the undeveloped landing site from this document.

rules.name: The Restrained Signal Rule
rules.body: Semantic green, orange, and red communicate state only; they never decorate navigation, headings, or empty space.

rules.name: The Theme Parity Rule
rules.body: A component must keep the same hierarchy in Night and Paper themes even when exact contrast relationships invert.

rules.name: The Fixed Layout Rule
rules.body: The user's 8px-32px setting scales typography tokens, not the root rem size, so layout dimensions remain stable while text grows.

rules.name: The No Display Type Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a display font, fluid viewport typography, negative letter spacing, or oversized product labels.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Persistent content surfaces use tonal separation and hairlines; if every section casts a shadow, the hierarchy is wrong.

dos: Do preserve Night and Paper theme parity using the existing semantic color roles.
Do keep repeated workflows compact, predictable, and directly adjacent to the active coding task.
Do show runtime, model, permission mode, branch, and execution state in plain domain language.
Do use familiar Lucide icons for commands and provide accessible names for icon-only buttons.
Do use tonal layering and 1px borders before adding a shadow.
Do keep controls usable under 8px-32px text scaling and constrained desktop widths.
Do use 150ms-260ms state transitions with ease-out curves; animate opacity and transform, not layout.
donts: Don't use marketing-style composition inside the app.
Don't add decorative gradients; the single subdued neutral canvas wash is the only existing exception.
Don't create excessive cards or cards nested inside cards.
Don't use oversized labels or hero-scale typography inside product UI.
Don't use runtime terminology that obscures the user's actual selection.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative colored side stripes, or saturated inactive states.
Don't invent a landing theme until the landing product and content are designed.
Don't open a modal when an inline or progressively disclosed control can complete the task.
